topics.query_ar: شرح P NP NP-Complete NP-Hard خوارزميات
topics.reason: Students struggle to differentiate between the overlapping complexity classes and understand the concept of non-deterministic polynomial time.

topics.topic_ar: الاختزال في وقت متعدد الحدود (Problem Reduction)
topics.reason: Constructing a valid mathematical mapping from one abstract problem to another to prove NP-Completeness requires deep analytical thinking.

topics.topic_en: Decision Trees for Sorting Lower Bounds
topics.topic_ar: أشجار القرار للحدود الدنيا (Decision Trees Lower Bounds)
topics.query_en: Decision tree model lower bound for sorting algorithms
topics.query_ar: شرح Decision Trees Lower Bounds خوارزميات
topics.reason: Modeling the execution of comparison-based algorithms as mathematical trees to calculate minimum worst-case time complexity is highly abstract.

topics.query_en: P vs NP complexity classes explained
topics.reason: Grasping the theoretical concept of non-deterministic Turing machines and the difference between solving a problem and verifying a solution is conceptually challenging.

topics.query_en: Optimization vs decision problems complexity theory
topics.query_ar: Optimization vs Decision problems شرح بالعربي
topics.reason: Transforming real-world optimization problems into binary decision problems to fit into the P/NP framework is counterintuitive for beginners.
